title: euodia hortensis var. odorifera
intro: Euodia hortensis var. odorifera, also known as Fragrant Euodia, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to China and other parts of Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Euodia hortensis var. odorifera include relief from pain, fever reduction, and improved immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through tea infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, and is sometimes used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
